skill.name: find-outlook-emails
skill.description: Search your Microsoft Outlook inbox and cross-reference emails with your contact history — find any email instantly and see full relationship context alongside it via Rarefriend. Use when the user wants to: check recent Outlook emails, search for an email by subject or sender, find emails from a specific person, look up what was discussed over email, cross- reference email threads with CRM notes, or connect their Microsoft Outlook email account. Triggers on: Outlook email, Microsoft email, inbox, email from, search email, recent emails, Outlook inbox, check my email, find email, email history, what did they say, email thread, did I hear back, follow up email.
skill.summary: Search Outlook emails and cross-reference with CRM contact history via Rarefriend MCP.
skill.author: Whitefield-Labs

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged 78 patterns with a risk score of 100/100, but evaluation confirms all findings are false positives. The detected 'backtick execution' patterns are markdown code blocks containing legitimate setup instructions for the Rarefriend MCP server. 'Hidden file access' references standard configuration paths like ~/.cursor/mcp.json and ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/. 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' detections are false positives on the acronym 'MCP' or 'OAuth'. 'Hardcoded URLs' point to the legitimate rarefriend.com domain. The skill is a standard MCP-based email integration with no malicious intent.

low_findings.title: MCP setup requires npx execution
low_findings.description: The setup instructions instruct users to run 'npx -y @rarefriend-ai/mcp' which downloads and executes a remote package. While this is standard for MCP integrations, users should verify the package source and integrity before running. This is a documentation pattern, not executable code in the skill itself.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The npx command is clearly documented in setup instructions and uses the official @rarefriend-ai/mcp package. This is standard practice for MCP-based skills.

content.user_title: Find Outlook Emails Instantly with CRM Context
content.value_statement: Searching Outlook for specific emails wastes time scrolling through cluttered inboxes. This skill connects to Rarefriend MCP to search emails by sender, subject, or keyword, and cross-references findings with your CRM contact history for full relationship context.
actual_capabilities: Search Outlook emails by sender, subject, body, or keywords
List recent inbox emails with date and folder filters
Cross-reference email senders with Rarefriend CRM contacts
Retrieve full CRM profiles and relationship notes for email senders
Connect Microsoft Outlook via OAuth through Rarefriend MCP
Create CRM notes summarizing email thread context
limitations: Requires Rarefriend MCP server to be configured and running
Email search returns up to 50 results per query
No support for sending, forwarding, or modifying emails (read-only)

use_cases.title: Sales follow-up preparation
use_cases.description: Search for recent emails from a prospect and review CRM notes to prepare for a follow-up call.

use_cases.title: Client communication history
use_cases.description: Find all email threads with a specific client and see relationship notes for full context before responding.

use_cases.title: Executive assistant inbox triage
use_cases.description: Quickly locate emails from key contacts and summarize communication history for executive review.

prompt_templates.title: Basic email search
prompt_templates.prompt: Find emails from john@acme.com in my Outlook inbox from the last 7 days.

prompt_templates.title: Email with CRM context
prompt_templates.prompt: Search my Outlook for emails from Sarah Chen, then show me her CRM contact profile and recent notes.

prompt_templates.title: Thread summary with history
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the email thread about the Q2 contract renewal, identify all participants, and summarize what was discussed along with any CRM notes.

prompt_templates.title: Setup and connect
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me set up Rarefriend MCP and connect my Microsoft Outlook account so I can search emails.

output_examples.input: Find emails from alice@startup.io this week
output_examples.output:
Found 3 emails from alice@startup.io since June 2:

1. Subject: 'Partnership proposal follow-up' - June 5, 2:30 PM
   Preview: 'Thanks for the introduction last week. I'd love to...' [Read more]

2. Subject: 'Re: Meeting notes' - June 4, 11:15 AM
   Preview: 'Attached are the notes from our discussion about...' [Read more]

3. Subject: 'Quick question about pricing' - June 2, 4:45 PM
   Preview: 'Hi, I had a follow-up question regarding the...' [Read more]

Would you like me to cross-reference Alice with your CRM contacts?

output_examples.input: Search for emails about the contract and show me who else has been involved
output_examples.output:
Found 5 emails matching 'contract':

Key participants in this thread:
- Alice Chen (alice@startup.io) - 2 emails
- Mark Johnson (mark@startup.io) - 1 email
- You - 2 replies

Most recent: 'Contract terms - final review' on June 6

Would you like me to pull up CRM notes for any of these contacts?

best_practices: Always check integration status first using list_connected_integrations before searching
Use specific sender names or email addresses for more accurate search results
Combine email search with CRM contact lookup for full relationship context
Create CRM notes after reviewing important email threads to maintain history
anti_patterns: Do not search for highly generic terms that may return too many results
Avoid sharing email content or contact details in public outputs without consent
Do not use this skill to send or modify emails - it is read-only

faq.question: What MCP server is required?
faq.answer: This skill requires the Rarefriend MCP server (@rarefriend-ai/mcp). You need OAuth credentials from rarefriend.com to connect.

faq.question: Can I send emails with this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only. It searches and retrieves emails but cannot send, forward, or modify them.

faq.question: How many emails can I retrieve at once?
faq.answer: You can retrieve up to 50 emails per query. For larger ranges, use date filters to narrow results.

faq.question: Does this work with Gmail or other providers?
faq.answer: No. This skill is specifically for Microsoft Outlook/Office 365. For Google services, use the organize-google-contacts or schedule-with-google-calendar skills.

faq.question: Is my email data secure?
faq.answer: Email data is processed through the Rarefriend MCP server using OAuth authentication. Credentials are stored in your local MCP configuration and not transmitted to third parties.

faq.question: How do I get OAuth credentials?
faq.answer: Sign in at rarefriend.com, go to Settings, Integrations, MCP, and generate an OAuth client. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret to your MCP configuration.
